desc: DONE offline with an intentional empty patch set. Exact-source audit found no proven version-gate-only 26.x delta: shared RTKit protocol 12 already boots ANS; DCP's enum selects ABI-specific 13.5/14.7 method tables while J614s has unresolved 26.x method and T6040 hardware deltas; ISP accepts UNKNOWN but lacks a T6040/H16 descriptor; SMC and SIO have no OS-firmware whitelist; GPU G16 is a real generation port. Emitted bounded [UPSTREAM] DCP/ISP evidence and test notes and explicit bans on speculative aliases. No local fork, rig work, MMIO, or external post. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-rtkit-26x-draft-audit.md.
author: sol
